title: Data Saudi — Provincial Demographic and Housing Indicators
abstract: Province-level demographic and housing indicators for Saudi Arabia sourced from the Data Saudi open data portal (GASTAT-derived), covering household size, housing type, dwelling counts, population density, and population growth by province and year.

resources.name: Household size by province and nationality (CSV)

variables.name: average_household_size
variables.label: Average Household Size
variables.description: Average household size by province, nationality (Saudi/Non-Saudi), and year.

variables.name: housing_units
variables.label: Housing Units
variables.description: Number of housing units by province, housing type (traditional house, apartment, villa, etc.), and year.

variables.name: number_of_dwellings
variables.label: Number of Dwellings
variables.description: Number of dwellings by dwelling type (e.g. residential) and province for the reporting year.

variables.name: population_density_region
variables.label: Population Density
variables.description: Reported population density by province (and Kingdom-wide total) and year.

variables.name: population_growth
variables.label: Population Growth Rate
variables.description: Year-over-year population growth rate by province.

steward.name: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia

access.how_to_request: Published openly on the Data Saudi portal (https://datasaudi.sa/en), sourced from GASTAT; no request required.

provenance.originator: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia, via Data Saudi portal

known_issues: Downloaded as five separate export files from the Data Saudi portal (filenames carry export timestamps of 2026-03-23), not a single curated dataset.
Province-level only; not disaggregated to Red Sea coastal cities/governorates.
No formal citation string could be confirmed for the Data Saudi portal exports, so citation is left null.
